description: Legal testimony in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Before 1146 CE. Abū ʿAlī(?) Yefet(?) b. Avraham ha-Zaqen Ibn al-Amshāṭī testifies that the letter is his letter and written in his hand. He further testifies that he has received from Abū ʿAlī Yeḥezqel b. Netanel ha-Levi (d. before 1146) all of the [...]. Also mentions Ibrāhīm al-Kohen al-Siqillī. ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
